ogTitle: Dutson vs Dutton Way: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dutson and Dutton Way.
heading: Dutson vs Dutton Way — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dutson, Victoria and Dutton Way, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dutson has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Dutton Way (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dutson or Dutton Way safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dutson has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Dutton Way scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dutson scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Dutton Way scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dutson or Dutton Way?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dutson has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
